name: civil-materials-skills
description: Civil engineering and construction materials research skills — research routing, paper reading, citation mapping, manuscript writing, academic polishing, figures, data/FAIR, reviewer simulation, response letters, and PPTX generation

plugins.name: civil-materials-skills
plugins.description: A collection of Claude-compatible academic workflow bundles for civil engineering and construction materials research, including research routing, paper reading, citation mapping, manuscript writing, academic polishing, figure creation, data/FAIR packaging, peer review simulation, reviewer response drafting, paper-to-PPTX conversion, and real PPTX generation.
